name: LuxeDecor2SC_Lister - v2

data.code:
let currentUrl = automaRefData('variables', 'product_link'); // Get the current URL in the loop
let concatenatedUrls = automaRefData('variables', 'product_urls') || "[]"; // Get the current concatenated JSON array string, or initialize if undefined
let urlsArray = JSON.parse(concatenatedUrls); // Parse the JSON string into an array
urlsArray.push(currentUrl); // Add the current URL to the array
automaSetVariable('product_urls', JSON.stringify(urlsArray)); // Update the variable with the new JSON array string
automaNextBlock();

data.note: Products link Scraper from a Category Page.
